__comment: Tenant API URL below. Set TENANT_CODE (and schedule App__Schedule__*) in .env. AWS:Region or AWS_REGION; credentials via env/profile/role. Outbound: Firebird, SMTP, HTTPS (443).

ScheduledTestEmail.Subject: [DRILL] Security alert: possible unauthorized access to your account
ScheduledTestEmail.PlainBody:
AUTOMATED DRILL — NOT A REAL SECURITY INCIDENT

This message was sent by the SQL Accounting auto-emailing test job. The scenario below is sample text only (for layout, routing, and mail-client testing).

--- Simulated notice ---

Dear user,

We have detected unusual activity that may indicate your account was accessed by someone else. Our logs show repeated failed sign-in attempts, followed by a successful login from an unrecognized device and location outside your usual patterns.

If this activity was not you, your credentials may be compromised. Do not use links in this email.

Recommended actions:
1. Sign out of all active sessions using your organization’s official account or password portal (type the address in your browser yourself).
2. Change your password immediately and ensure multi-factor authentication is enabled, if your IT policy allows it.
3. Contact your IT or security team and reference: AUTO-EMAILING-DRILL

If you recognize this activity, you can disregard this notice after confirming with IT.

--- End simulated notice ---

You do not need to take any action for this drill unless your administrator asks you to. Questions: contact IT.

— SQL Accounting scheduled email worker (test template)
